   sphinx-quickstart on Tue Mar 24 15:27:19 2026.

   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Gastronomy documentation
========================

.. Add your content using ``reStructuredText`` syntax. See the
.. `reStructuredText <https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/usage/restructuredtext/index.html>`_
.. documentation for details.

This is a simple library for keeping track of elemental mixtures
in molecules or solid compounds. I use it to compute X-ray absorption
models with Verner & Yaklovev tables. It also holds several abundance tables
and depletion parameters used in the literature and for convenience.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   installation
   quickstart
   modules
